title: mentha × dalmatica var. pancicii
intro: Mentha × dalmatica var. pancicii, also known as Dalmatian pennyroyal, is a hybrid mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural antispasmodic, antiseptic, and carminative, making it effective in treating menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and relieving stress and anxiety. Dalmatian pennyroyal can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are commonly used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
